page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: AGRO608, NRSC608, or PLSC608.

Formerly: NRSC608.

PLSC609 Integrated Pest Management (1-4 Credits)

A modular course with an interdisciplinary approach to the theory and practice of integrated pest management. Topics of modules, each

3-4 weeks long, vary each semester over a three year time frame, with the first module serving as a prerequisite for all other modules. See www.EntmClasses.umd.edu for description of modules.
